name: SubjectHubNotesSection empty-state 'Add note' is a no-op when draft empty
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-11] submitDraft early-returns on empty draft; the button appears to do nothing. Fix: focus the input or disable until non-empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the empty-state Add note button reuses submitDraft while draft is empty; submitDraft trims and returns with no focus, disabled state, or feedback, so the visible CTA is a no-op. Variants: empty draft, whitespace-only draft, and valid non-empty draft. Regression test: extend apps/mobile/src/components/subject-hub/SubjectHubNotesSection.test.tsx so the empty-state action is not an inert no-op and valid note submission still calls onAddNote and clears the draft.
